summary: Completed comprehensive testing of httpOnly cookie authentication migration. All backend tests (10/10) and frontend tests passed. The migration from localStorage to httpOnly cookies is fully functional.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend correctly sets access_token cookie with HttpOnly=true, Secure=true, SameSite=lax
Frontend axios is configured with withCredentials:true for automatic cookie sending
auth.service.js correctly calls /auth/logout endpoint to delete cookie server-side
auth.py middleware correctly reads token from cookies first, then falls back to Authorization header
'Made with Emergent' badge has been removed from index.html
context_for_next_testing_agent: httpOnly cookie authentication is fully working. Login sets secure cookie, /api/auth/me works with cookie, logout deletes cookie. Token is NOT accessible via document.cookie (httpOnly working). 'Made with Emergent' badge removed.

details: Login endpoint sets access_token cookie with HttpOnly=true
Only posthog analytics cookie visible in document.cookie
Set-Cookie header sets Max-Age=0 to delete cookie
'Made with Emergent' badge not found in page
No emergent-related elements found in DOM
Protected pages accessible with cookie auth
